api.invite.errors.invitation_not_found_o.context: Returned when an invite token doesn't match or has expired

api.invite.errors.token_required.context: Returned when the invite token path parameter is missing

api.invite.errors.organization_no_longer.context: Returned when the invitation's organization has been deleted

api.invite.errors.invitation_already_pro.text: This invitation has already been processed
api.invite.errors.invitation_already_pro.context: Generic fallback when an invitation is no longer pending and its status is not specifically accepted or declined

api.invite.errors.invitation_already_acc.text: This invitation has already been accepted
api.invite.errors.invitation_already_acc.context: Returned when accepting or declining an invitation that was already accepted (status accepted/active)

api.invite.errors.invitation_already_dec.text: This invitation has already been declined
api.invite.errors.invitation_already_dec.context: Returned when accepting or declining an invitation that was already declined

api.invite.errors.invitation_expired.context: Returned when an invitation has passed its expiration time

api.invite.errors.email_mismatch.text: Your email address does not match the invitation
api.invite.errors.email_mismatch.context: Returned when the accepting user's email doesn't match the invitee email

api.invite.errors.already_member.text: You are already a member of this organization
api.invite.errors.already_member.context: Returned when the accepting user is already a member
